ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Continued To Jun-02-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GERON COLEMAN'S Motion To Dismiss is denied. Defendant made a general appearance when he sought affirmative relief to compel arbitration. [See Factor Health Mgmt., LLC v. Sup.Ct. (Apex Therapeutic Care, Inc.) (2005) 132 CA4th 246, 250.] The essential elements to be pleaded in an action for breach of contract are: (1) the contract; (2) plaintiff's performance of the contract or excuse for nonperformance; (3) defendants' breach; and (4) the resulting damage to plaintiff. [See Lortz v. Connell, (1969) 273 Cal. App. 2d 286, 290.] In the case at bar Plaintiff has pled each element. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/EHG)
